title: Overall Progress Computation
excerpt: I have a number column set as percentage. At the bottom i have enabled the Column summary as percentage. I got my percentage but how can i use this in one of my reports without manually entering it to another table?

posts.author: kedalonzo (Ked Alonzo)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a number column set as percentage. At the bottom i have enabled the Column summary as percentage. I got my percentage but how can i use this in one of my reports without manually entering it to another table?

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @kedalonzo,

Is your report located on a board or in a dashboard?

In a dashboard:

Capture d’écran 2024-01-17 à 14.22.162096×600 73.7 KB

Please consider the column “Percentage.” My summary is a sum.

I create a DASHBOARD, and then I use the numbers widget, which I set to “sum.” I select my percentage column:

Capture d’écran 2024-01-17 à 14.22.33720×432 27.8 KB

Does this workaround work for you?
